title: Teaching AI to Do Good
modules: Why AI Safety Is Everyone's Problem
What Does AI Alignment Actually Mean?
When AI Optimizes for the Wrong Goal
Global AI Safety Efforts and Organizations
What You Can Do About AI Safety
synopsis: As AI systems grow more capable, ensuring they reliably do what we actually want — and not something subtly or dangerously different — has become one of the most urgent challenges in technology. This course demystifies AI safety and alignment research so curious learners can understand the stakes and join an informed global conversation.
rationale: A corpus similarity of just 0.50 against 'Ethics Framework' — the lowest among the three gaps — combined with a solid demand signal of 6/10 shows that AI safety and alignment concepts remain almost entirely absent from public literacy curricula despite representing existential-level consequences for society.
